Name: SPELL_PARAM
Description: Defines spell behavior, including casting requirements, animations, stamina costs, usage counts, movement restrictions, and audiovisual effects across different weapon handling modes.

Fields.Name: Spell Category
Fields.Description: Category classification of the spell (e.g., sorcery, miracle, etc.).

Fields.Name: Allow Dual-Wield Two-Handed Casting
Fields.Description: Determines whether the spell can be cast while dual-wielding in a two-handed configuration.

Fields.Name: Usage Condition
Fields.Description: Conditions that must be met for the spell to be usable.

Fields.Name: Required Intelligence
Fields.Description: Minimum intelligence required to cast the spell.

Fields.Name: Required Faith
Fields.Description: Minimum faith required to cast the spell.

Fields.Name: Base Bullet ID
Fields.Description: ID of the base projectile used by the spell.

Fields.Name: Base Damage ID
Fields.Description: ID of the base damage profile used by the spell.

Fields.Name: 1H Normal Cast Time Scale
Fields.Description: Casting time multiplier for normal one-handed spell casting.

Fields.Name: 1H Normal Cast Hold Time
Fields.Description: Duration of the casting hold phase for normal one-handed casting.

Fields.Name: 1H Normal Chant Animation ID
Fields.Description: Animation ID used during chanting for normal one-handed casting.

Fields.Name: 1H Normal Cast Animation ID
Fields.Description: Animation ID used when releasing a normal one-handed spell.

Fields.Name: 1H Normal Stamina Cost Multiplier
Fields.Description: Stamina cost multiplier for normal one-handed casting.

Fields.Name: 1H Strong Cast Time Scale
Fields.Description: Casting time multiplier for strong one-handed casting.

Fields.Name: 1H Strong Cast Hold Time
Fields.Description: Hold duration for strong one-handed casting.

Fields.Name: 1H Strong Chant Animation ID
Fields.Description: Chant animation used for strong one-handed casting.

Fields.Name: 1H Strong Cast Animation ID
Fields.Description: Cast animation used for strong one-handed casting.

Fields.Name: 1H Strong Stamina Cost Multiplier
Fields.Description: Stamina cost multiplier for strong one-handed casting.

Fields.Name: 2H Normal Cast Time Scale
Fields.Description: Casting time multiplier for normal two-handed casting.

Fields.Name: 2H Normal Cast Hold Time
Fields.Description: Hold duration for normal two-handed casting.

Fields.Name: 2H Normal Chant Animation ID
Fields.Description: Chant animation for normal two-handed casting.

Fields.Name: 2H Normal Cast Animation ID
Fields.Description: Cast animation for normal two-handed casting.

Fields.Name: 2H Normal Stamina Cost Multiplier
Fields.Description: Stamina cost multiplier for normal two-handed casting.

Fields.Name: 2H Strong Cast Time Scale
Fields.Description: Casting time multiplier for strong two-handed casting.

Fields.Name: 2H Strong Cast Hold Time
Fields.Description: Hold duration for strong two-handed casting.

Fields.Name: 2H Strong Chant Animation ID
Fields.Description: Chant animation for strong two-handed casting.

Fields.Name: 2H Strong Cast Animation ID
Fields.Description: Cast animation for strong two-handed casting.

Fields.Name: 2H Strong Stamina Cost Multiplier
Fields.Description: Stamina cost multiplier for strong two-handed casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 1H Normal Cast Time Scale
Fields.Description: Casting time multiplier for normal dual-wield one-handed casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 1H Normal Hold Time
Fields.Description: Hold duration for normal dual-wield casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 1H Normal Chant Animation ID
Fields.Description: Chant animation for dual-wield normal casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 1H Normal Cast Animation ID
Fields.Description: Cast animation for dual-wield normal casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 1H Normal Stamina Cost Multiplier
Fields.Description: Stamina cost multiplier for dual-wield normal casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 1H Strong Cast Time Scale
Fields.Description: Casting time multiplier for strong dual-wield casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 1H Strong Hold Time
Fields.Description: Hold duration for strong dual-wield casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 1H Strong Chant Animation ID
Fields.Description: Chant animation for strong dual-wield casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 1H Strong Cast Animation ID
Fields.Description: Cast animation for strong dual-wield casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 1H Strong Stamina Cost Multiplier
Fields.Description: Stamina cost multiplier for strong dual-wield casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 2H Normal Cast Time Scale
Fields.Description: Casting time multiplier for normal dual-wield two-handed casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 2H Normal Hold Time
Fields.Description: Hold duration for normal dual-wield two-handed casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 2H Normal Chant Animation ID
Fields.Description: Chant animation for dual-wield two-handed normal casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 2H Normal Cast Animation ID
Fields.Description: Cast animation for dual-wield two-handed normal casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 2H Normal Stamina Cost Multiplier
Fields.Description: Stamina cost multiplier for dual-wield normal casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 2H Strong Cast Time Scale
Fields.Description: Casting time multiplier for strong dual-wield two-handed casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 2H Strong Hold Time
Fields.Description: Hold duration for strong dual-wield casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 2H Strong Chant Animation ID
Fields.Description: Chant animation for strong dual-wield two-handed casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 2H Strong Cast Animation ID
Fields.Description: Cast animation for strong dual-wield two-handed casting.

Fields.Name: Dual-Wield 2H Strong Stamina Cost Multiplier
Fields.Description: Stamina cost multiplier for strong dual-wield casting.

Fields.Name: Lock-On Effective Range Scale
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting effective attack distance while locked on.

Fields.Name: Can Move
Fields.Description: Determines whether movement is allowed while casting.

Fields.Name: Can Delay Shot
Fields.Description: Allows holding the spell before release.

Fields.Name: Can Predict Shot
Fields.Description: Enables predictive targeting for projectiles.

Fields.Name: Chant Sound ID: 0
Fields.Description: Sound effect ID played during chanting phase (slot 0).

Fields.Name: Chant SFX ID: 0
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID played during chanting phase (slot 0).

Fields.Name: Chant SFX Attach Target: 0
Fields.Description: Target location for attaching SFX0.

Fields.Name: Chant SFX Right Hand Dummy Poly ID: 0
Fields.Description: Attachment point for right-hand weapon SFX0.

Fields.Name: Chant SFX Left Hand Dummy Poly ID: 0
Fields.Description: Attachment point for left-hand weapon SFX0.

Fields.Name: Chant SFX Immediate Removal: 0
Fields.Description: Determines whether SFX0 is removed instantly without fade.

Fields.Name: Chant SE ID: 1
Fields.Description: Sound effect ID for secondary chanting audio.

Fields.Name: Chant SFX ID: 1
Fields.Description: Secondary visual effect ID for chanting.

Fields.Name: Chant SFX Attach Target: 1
Fields.Description: Attachment target for SFX1.

Fields.Name: Chant SFX Right Hand Dummy Poly ID: 1
Fields.Description: Right-hand attachment point for SFX1.

Fields.Name: Chant SFX Left Hand Dummy Poly ID: 1
Fields.Description: Left-hand attachment point for SFX1.

Fields.Name: Chant SFX Immediate Removal: 1
Fields.Description: Determines whether SFX1 is removed instantly without fade.

Fields.Name: Parallel Movement Speed Reduction [%]
Fields.Description: Movement speed reduction while strafing during casting.

Fields.Name: Walk Speed Reduction [%]
Fields.Description: Movement speed reduction while walking during casting.

Fields.Name: Lock-On Walk Speed Reduction [%]
Fields.Description: Movement speed reduction while walking with lock-on during casting.

Fields.Name: Spell Start Animation Speed [%]
Fields.Description: Playback speed multiplier for spell start animation.

Fields.Name: Spell End Animation Speed [%]
Fields.Description: Playback speed multiplier for spell end animation.

Fields.Name: Poise Duration [%]
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting poise/tenacity duration during casting.

Fields.Name: Casting Sound Category
Fields.Description: Category used to select spell casting sound effects.

Fields.Name: Required Equip Slots
Fields.Description: Number of equip slots required to use the spell.

Fields.Name: Usage Count Level 1
Fields.Description: Number of uses available at level 1.

Fields.Name: Usage Count Level 2
Fields.Description: Number of uses available at level 2.

Fields.Name: Usage Count Level 3
Fields.Description: Number of uses available at level 3.

Fields.Name: Usage Count Level 4
Fields.Description: Number of uses available at level 4.

Fields.Name: Usage Count Level 5
Fields.Description: Number of uses available at level 5.

Fields.Name: Usage Count Level 6
Fields.Description: Number of uses available at level 6.

Fields.Name: Usage Count Level 7
Fields.Description: Number of uses available at level 7.

Fields.Name: Usage Count Level 8
Fields.Description: Number of uses available at level 8.

Fields.Name: Usage Count Level 9
Fields.Description: Number of uses available at level 9.

Fields.Name: Usage Count Level 10
Fields.Description: Number of uses available at level 10.

Fields.Name: Soul Consumption Param ID
Fields.Description: Reference to soul cost configuration for casting or usage.

Fields.Name: Left-Hand Base Bullet ID
Fields.Description: Base projectile ID used when casting with left hand.

Fields.Name: Left-Hand Base Damage ID
Fields.Description: Base damage profile ID used for left-hand casting.
